title: Retribution (disambiguation)
content:
'''Retribution''' could refer to several things:

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''''[[Retribution]]''''', a [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|''Resurgent''-class Star Destroyer]].

===[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]===
*'''''[[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|Retribution]]''''', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].
*'''''[[Retribution (Discril-class)|Retribution]]''''', a [[Discril-class attack cruiser|''Discril''-class attack cruiser]].
*'''''[[Retribution (Marauder-class)|Retribution]]''''', a [[Marauder-class corvette|''Marauder''-class corvette]].
*'''''[[Retribution (Tartan-class)|Retribution]]''''', a [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser]].
*'''''[[Retribution (Imperial-class)|Retribution]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*[[Retribution (carbine)|'''Retribution''']], a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]].
*[[Retribution (religion)|'''Retribution''']], a punishment in the [[Sacred Way/Legends|Sacred Way]].

==Real world==
*"[[Retribution (short story)|'''Retribution''']]", a short companion narrative published in ''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
